meta.question: What is the main purpose of the model?
meta.finalAnswer: The model serves as the Design Description (DDD) for the Alignment and Phasing System (APS). Its purpose is to document the system's key requirements, system design, and operational concepts, acting as a living document that reflects the current state of the APS design.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("purpose")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The initial search for "Purpose" returned many specific view elements and requirements, but not a high-level model description. I need to map the properties of one of these "Purpose" elements to see if they contain a textual description of the model's purpose.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/view/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%2520DDD::Introduction::Purpose> ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The property mapping shows `ownedComment` and `ownedElement`. I will now query the content of the `ownedComment` to see if it contains the purpose description.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?commentBody WHERE {
  <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/TMT/view/TMT::Project::Work%2520Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment%2520and%2520Phasing%2520System::Systems%2520Engineering::09%2520Views::TMT-APS-SE::TMT-APS%2520DDD::Introduction::Purpose> vocab:Element_ownedComment ?comment .
  ?comment vocab:Comment_body ?commentBody .
}

request.reason: The query successfully retrieved the purpose description from the "Purpose" view element, which states that the document (and by extension, the model) provides the Design Description (DDD) for the Alignment and Phasing System (APS), including key requirements, system design, and operational concepts.

request.answer: The model serves as the Design Description (DDD) for the Alignment and Phasing System (APS). Its purpose is to document the system's key requirements, system design, and operational concepts, acting as a living document that reflects the current state of the APS design.

events.finalAnswer: The model serves as the Design Description (DDD) for the Alignment and Phasing System (APS). Its purpose is to document the system's key requirements, system design, and operational concepts, acting as a living document that reflects the current state of the APS design.
